facts.statement: The Eiffel Tower stands 400 meters tall
facts.actual: 300 m architectural height; 324 m to the current antenna tip

facts.statement: 100 tons of paint are applied to the Eiffel Tower to prevent rust every 7 years
facts.actual: Maintenance of the tower includes applying 60 tons of paint every 7 years

facts.statement: The Eiffel Tower contains 5 million rivets
The Eiffel Tower is made up of 10,000 different parts
10 workers died during the construction of the Eiffel Tower
